headline: Financial Stocks Rally To New Highs. JPMorgan Is One Of Them.
summary: JPMorgan Chase stock and two other financial names hit new highs. A pharmaceutical stock also reached a high and is in a buy zone.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Invesco, Raises Price Target to $30
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Michael Cyprys   maintains Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $29 to $30.

headline: What Is Kimi K3? The Chinese AI Model That Has Wall Street Talking
summary: Moonshot claims Kimi K3 narrowed the performance gap with leading U.S. models and outperforms several competing systems on coding and agentic AI benchmarks.
